data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for the 'Last processed event checkpoint', but the evidence provided does not include any information or confirmation regarding the existence or status of this checkpoint. The linked use case mentions the need for a last processed event checkpoint, but there are no concrete API reads or persisted state checks provided to confirm its presence or functionality. This leads to a clear gap in the evidence needed to satisfy the requirement.
gaps: No evidence of the last processed event checkpoint being validated or confirmed.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add validation for last processed event checkpoint
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify the existence and status of the last processed event checkpoint.
